race.comment: ROBERT THE PUSS (3) has returned in good order, only missing by a lip last time here when closing strongly from off the pace. Peaking now and is ready to put it all together. FRANCE'S BOY (2) is a stalwart of the SA racing scene, as he lines up at start 169. Boasts recent peaks that measure up well for this and gets in well at the weights with the 3kg claimer engaged. Expect him to bounce straight the front from his low draw and be in this for a very long away. Don't dismiss the old boy. HEAD OF THE HERD (5) doesn't win out of turn but is knocking on the door and finds a suitable assignment. If ZJP can utilise the low draw he will take some stopping. ENCIPHERING (1) will find this a fair bit easier but will likely get a long way back from his draw. If the tempo is genuine he can give them a scare late. EXPLICABLE (4) has struggled on the dirt in his last two and is capable of bouncing back sharply back on the turf.
